current_tree_policy: No private repository locator, live secret, real message field or local absolute path may appear.

local_history.rule: Never push the Stage 0 development branch or any ancestor containing the withheld source.

final_publication.required_history_mode: clean snapshot branch from then-current origin/main

new commit history sensitive scan has zero matches
full final review and remediation is complete
all S0-S7 acceptance and release gates pass
